overview.zh: 美利坚合众国位于北美洲中部，东临大西洋、西濒太平洋，是世界第三大领土国和人口大国。由五十个州组成，移民文化多元，是世界第一大经济体，在科技、金融与高等教育领域具有全球影响力。
overview.en: The United States of America lies in central North America, bordered by the Atlantic to the east and the Pacific to the west. Made up of fifty states with a diverse immigrant culture, it is the world's largest economy and a global leader in technology, finance and higher education.

capitalHistory.zh: 华盛顿哥伦比亚特区于1790年经国会决议设立为联邦首都，由工程师朗方规划，以开国总统乔治·华盛顿命名，联邦政府于1800年正式迁入。
capitalHistory.en: Washington, D.C. was established as the federal capital by an act of Congress in 1790, planned by engineer Pierre L'Enfant and named after the first president, George Washington; the federal government moved there in 1800.

climate.zh: 国土辽阔、气候多样：东部与中部多为温带大陆性与温带季风气候，西南部干旱少雨，佛罗里达南部与夏威夷属热带气候，阿拉斯加部分地区为寒带气候。
climate.en: A vast territory with varied climates: temperate continental and humid subtropical in the east and center, arid in the southwest, tropical in southern Florida and Hawaii, and subarctic in parts of Alaska.

note.zh: 歌词由弗朗西斯·斯科特·基于1814年创作，1931年正式确立为国歌。
note.en: Lyrics written by Francis Scott Key in 1814; officially adopted as the national anthem in 1931.

note.zh: 曾于1994年主办世界杯，并将与加拿大、墨西哥共同承办2026年世界杯。
note.en: Hosted the 1994 World Cup and will co-host the 2026 World Cup with Canada and Mexico.

colorNotes.zh: 白色常与纯洁、婚礼相关；红白蓝三色具有强烈的国家象征意义。
colorNotes.en: White is linked with purity and weddings; red, white and blue carry strong national symbolism.

colorNotes.zh: 绿色常联想到金钱与环保。
colorNotes.en: Green is often associated with money and environmental themes.

culturalTaboos.zh: 重视个人空间与隐私，餐饮服务普遍有小费文化。
culturalTaboos.en: Personal space and privacy are valued; tipping is customary in dining and services.

formatting.zh: 日期常用 月/日/年；名字在前、姓氏在后。
formatting.en: Dates commonly use MM/DD/YYYY; given name precedes family name.

formatting.zh: 数字用逗号作千位分隔、句点作小数点，如 1,234.56。
formatting.en: Numbers use a comma as the thousands separator and a period as the decimal point, e.g. 1,234.56.

funFacts.zh: 美国在联邦层面没有法定官方语言，但英语在全国广泛通用。
funFacts.en: The U.S. has no official language at the federal level, though English is used nationwide.

funFacts.zh: 国家公园体系始于1872年设立的黄石国家公园，是世界上最早的国家公园之一。
funFacts.en: The national park system began with Yellowstone in 1872, one of the world's first national parks.

label.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录
